introSection: Vilde Hønsejagt (English: Wild Chicken Hunt) is a steel roller coaster at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Jylland, Denmark. It opened with the rest of Bondegårdsland on 1 May 2015. It is the spiritual successor to Karlo's Taxi, but is not built in its former spot. It occupies the land previously used for Karolines Helikopter and a picknick field instead.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The roller coaster takes a 90-degree right turn before ascending the high Tyre propelled lift. It then drops and navigates various turns and a helix before coming to the brake run. The entire circuit is then repeated once more.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Light grey track and brown supports.

fullText:
Vilde Hønsejagt (English: Wild Chicken Hunt) is a steel roller coaster at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Jylland, Denmark. It opened with the rest of Bondegårdsland on 1 May 2015. It is the spiritual successor to Karlo's Taxi, but is not built in its former spot. It occupies the land previously used for Karolines Helikopter and a picknick field instead.

The roller coaster takes a 90-degree right turn before ascending the high Tyre propelled lift. It then drops and navigates various turns and a helix before coming to the brake run. The entire circuit is then repeated once more.

Light grey track and brown supports.
